A '''battle''' took place in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Following the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Reecee|capture]] of [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]], a small number of surviving [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] accompanied the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' to the secret [[Eclipse Station]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] base in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. A Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] followed, but it was destroyed by [[Booster Terrik]]'s surprise tactics and the forces of the Jedi base, which was kept secret.

{{Battle-stub}}
